expectations.text: Does not manually check color scheme for styling
expectations.evidence: Imports useMantineColorScheme() and useMantineTheme(), manually checking isDark to set backgroundColor and borderColor

expectations.text: Uses classNames prop with CSS modules
expectations.evidence: Uses inline style prop extensively for backgroundColor, borderColor, borderWidth, borderStyle
Uses theme.colors.dark[7], theme.white, theme.colors.dark[3], theme.colors.gray[6] - manual color lookups instead of semantic tokens

expectations.text: Uses radius and shadow props on Card
expectations.evidence: Card radius='lg' used, though shadow differs by color scheme unnecessarily

expectations.text: Does not use deprecated Mantine v6 props
expectations.evidence: Uses noWrap (should be wrap='nowrap'), direction='column' (should be Stack), spacing={4} (should be gap), weight={600} (should be fw={600}), color prop on Text (should be c)
